title: Zombifiedcraft
description: “A tense survival-focused Minecraft modpack where a growing zombie apocalypse reshapes every night into a fight to stay alive.”
body:
![Zombifiedcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df4d739b65d0ad32fcbec3fd9c3e8d2089ff5f93.png)

Zombified Minecraft transforms the classic Minecraft world into a relentless, undead-infested survival challenge. The infection has taken over, and every corner of the world is crawling with new types of zombies, harsher survival mechanics, and an atmosphere built to keep you constantly on edge.

In this modpack, days feel shorter, nights feel longer, and nowhere is ever truly safe. Zombies evolve, adapt, and overwhelm in numbers. Some burn in sunlight—many do not. Structures are ruined, resources are scarce, and survival requires strategy, caution, and courage. Whether you’re fortifying a base, scavenging abandoned buildings, or pushing into the darkness in search of rare loot, danger is always one step behind you.

Features include:

Enhanced, smarter, and more varied zombies that can break blocks, detect players from farther away, or swarm in large groups.

Post-apocalyptic world generation, with ruined cities, abandoned shelters, and scattered remnants of civilization.

Improved survival mechanics such as hunger tweaks, scarce resources, and tougher nights.

Dark, immersive atmosphere, including foggy landscapes, eerie ambient sounds, and reduced visibility to amplify tension.

Expanded combat and gear progression to help you hold back the undead onslaught.

Balanced progression encouraging exploration, base-defense builds, and long-term survival planning.

If you’re looking for a Minecraft experience that’s darker, harder, and packed with undead chaosZombified Minecraft is your next nightmare.
